score_evidence.completeness: Required fields present: rfc (TEST-RFC-003) ✓, revenue_amount (420,000) ✓, tax_jurisdiction (Mexico — IVA 16%) ✓, filing_period (2026-12) ✓, cfdi_reference (placeholder) ✓, deductibles (array with 1 item) ✓. Note: client_rfc field present (TEST-RFC-003 — same as firm RFC, which may be a test data issue) and revenue field is redundant with revenue_amount. Deductibles amount=0 with note that actual subcontractor invoices will be itemized by accountant. Score 4 (all required fields present but deductibles not yet itemized with actual amounts).
score_evidence.accuracy: revenue_amount=420,000 USD matches running_total from invoice.json ✓. Tax jurisdiction=Mexico IVA 16% is correct standard rate. Filing period 2026-12 aligns with M3 milestone date of 2026-12-22. However, the invoice only covers M3 (the third and final milestone). The tax filing at 420,000 USD revenue matches the cumulative total across all three milestones (M1=168,000 + M2=126,000 + M3=126,000 = 420,000) — but only one invoice file (invoice.json showing M3) is in the project folder. If M1 and M2 invoices were issued separately, this filing should reflect those periods too. Scoring 4 — revenue total is correct but multi-period invoicing detail not verifiable from available files.
score_evidence.clarity: cfdi_reference is placeholder ('[CFDI — TO BE GENERATED BY ACCOUNTANT]'). Filing cannot be traced back to source invoices without CFDI references. Score 3.
score_evidence.state_sync: No Asana state field in deliverable. Simulated run. Score 3.
score_evidence.timing: Filed at 2026-12-22T00:00:00, same day as M3 milestone trigger. Score 5.

decision_commentary: Tax filing revenue total (USD 420,000) matches Controller's cumulative invoiced total. Correct jurisdiction (IVA 16%) and filing period. Key gaps: (1) cfdi_reference is a placeholder — filing cannot be traced to source invoices; (2) deductibles are not itemized (amount=0, deferred to accountant); (3) only one invoice file (M3) is present in project folder — M1 and M2 invoice files not found, though total revenue is consistent with 3-milestone fee structure. State sync scored 3 per simulated run convention. No hard auto-fail conditions triggered — RFC present, revenue amount matches, filing not incomplete in structure.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia gate on tax filing.
